contract.title: Review Queue
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for queue-first review and triage surfaces.
contract.content_frame: Show priority items, aging, and next review actions in one glance.
contract.data_view: Keep queue counts and row actions visible together.
contract.form_action: Use deliberate triage and assignment actions.

reference_set.title: Queue References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for triage and review queues.

contract.title: Evidence Bundle
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for side-by-side evidence, references, and notes.
contract.content_frame: Keep source evidence, notes, and selected context in one stable view.
contract.data_view: Make supporting documents and review context easy to compare.
contract.form_action: Favor append-only notes and deliberate evidence acceptance.

reference_set.title: Evidence References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for review bundles and supporting material.

contract.title: Approval Board
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for gate checks, signoff state, and escalation paths.
contract.content_frame: Show approval state, blockers, and handoff actions without burying them.
contract.data_view: Make approver, time, and state visible across the board.
contract.form_action: Require explicit review and confirm states for approvals.

reference_set.title: Approval References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for signoff and decision boards.

contract.title: Release Summary
contract.summary: Shared starter rules for release-ready reporting, evidence summaries, and signoff output.
contract.content_frame: Lead with readiness, outcome, and linked evidence.
contract.data_view: Attach release notes, decisions, and evidence in one export-friendly surface.
contract.form_action: Use clear publish or export actions with final confirmation.

reference_set.title: Release References
reference_set.summary: Pattern hints for review summaries and release handoff pages.
